review_title: Liine is a great and unique software
description: Liine is a great business and they provide a great product, as well as exceptional customer service. Many of our clients and our internal team constantly have questions regarding how to set up or use the software and they are always quick to answer or help troubleshoot.
author: Ashley W.
pros: Liine is a great business development tool for practices who are focusing on improving lead performance, conversion rates, customer service, etc. Since most of the software is automated, it saves the practice time, which I know is a big deal for many busy, small businesses. I haven't seen a similar product that is as accessible in the market as Liine is.
cons: Since the product is so unique, there is a learning curve. Most of our customers are not great with technology in general, so it becomes difficult for them to learn and understand the software and how to properly use it so they can receive the maximum benefits from it.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Easy to use, helpful with keeping up with patient flow, nothing too complicated that I can't figure out how to use, great experience so far!
author: Samantha J.
pros: Makes it easy to contact patients. The automatic all system is great. Being able to keep up with calls in real time is super helpful.
cons: There isn't anything I can think of that I do not like. Its easy to navigate, makes it easy to contact patients, etc.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Samantha L.
pros: I like that texts are able to be easily located by guest name. I also like that there are two categories for texts that have been opened, but not responded to.
cons: I wish there was an easier way to change automated messages or auto filled messages.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: Liine has been extremely helpful in running our practice. We use these numbers weekly to gauge our patient leads and how they come in. I particularly like being able to hear the calls and using it as a tool to help our admin team as well.
author: Casey M.
pros: call management, lead generation, ease of use, training tool, patient management, having everything in one place has been really helpful.
cons: There are no cons this software has been very helpful. We use these numbers in our scorecard every week.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Liine helps dental offices improve all in one place
description: Absolutely love it! The Liine team is extremely supportive. It is most helpful to have all the analytical data in one place. Liine is always looking to improve and add integrations of vendors to it's platform.
author: Jennifer S.
pros: Analytical data tells you where you need the most improvement and provides invaluable KPIs for daily operations. Track your marketing ROI so you are spending dollars on expenses the matter most.
cons: I would like to default the timeframe to current month. Currently, it defaults to last week. At some point, I would also like to see future appointments booked for the month and quarter.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: This is just what you need!
description: Excellent! The online platform is outstanding and provides useful data in real time. The Liine Team has always been very responsive to any question I had and has provided a timely response.
author: Leigh B.
pros: The ability to see where our new patient leads are coming from. This helps us see ROI for all our marketing and helps us focus future marketing campaigns to get the most from our marketing spend.
cons: I don't have any complaints. The platform is easy to use and I can customize reports in any way to see the data I need. Liine sends me a weekly summary as well so any problem areas can be identified quickly.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Overall, it is a very useful platform, and it has lots of pros just as it has its cones, But the software does help a lot with the flow of the office.
author: Amy M.
pros: So far, this software has been helping the office locate and see miss calls and also it helps with knowing if the patient is a new patient or existing.
cons: That it does not allow text messages. As well the only thing i can add it would be useful for patients to state if the appointment is for cleaning or for a consult
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: its been great. love to listen to the calls to learn about more ways to improve our phone skills and booking skills.
author: Sarah C.
pros: easy to use. I love how i can manage through the calls and see the reasons why some appointments were not booked.
cons: ai does not always recognize existing patients or referrals. therefore, i find myself having to open tickets and ask staff for help.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Our experience was excellent!!! Our entire office appreciates the quick response to questions and ways to improve.
author: Amy H.
pros: Excellent customer service!!! [sensitive content hidden] is wonderful!!! She quickly offered assistance, and we greatly appreciate her knowledge and her time!!!
cons: There's nothing I've disliked about Liine. It's an excellent system and a great way to monitor calls and scheduling.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Simple to use and very helpful. The Interaction log is very useful Learning tool and to help us ensure we are providing excellent customer service
author: Trina P.
pros: What I like the most about Liine is that I am able check my stats and see how I am progressing in real time.
cons: That I have to keep changing the filter to reflect my name instead of having it as a default option then changing it when i need to review team stats
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Its a great program thus far. much easier to navigate and schedule leads.
author: Esperanza M.
pros: very convenient and easy to navigate. Leads are given to me right away.
cons: I don't like that after attempting to reach someone after 3-4 times the lead is still left there. I think it should be archived or something.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: In my 15 years of medical marketing experience, I’ve never used a tool as strong as Liine.
description: Solid program never goes off-line and has a fantastic support team.
author: Eddie E.
pros: Super clean interface. The data is accurate, without gimmicks. Authenticity and clear information makes Lline a great marketing tool.
cons: Being able to manager my team accounts and not being able to generate custom reports.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: I really think this has been beneficial for us. We have been up to follow up with patients that have not called back. I really like that you can also text with the patient as well.
author: Celeste T.
pros: I like that I can view which patients I have called and can follow back up with them if I have only left a message.
cons: I wish you were able to delete or edit an entry when you put one into Line.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: great overall. This is a great way to drop in and monitor customer service and see measurable results.
author: Karenda C.
pros: Love the visual infographics on the dashboard
cons: doesn't seem to always credit calls that don't apply to the conversion rate
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: This app has been so easy to use and overall made it easy to do my job.
author: Jessica D.
pros: Liine has been very easy to use, I was able to learn to use it and start my work fast.
cons: There is nothing I can say I didn't like so far I love it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It has been very good! One of the most user friendly programs I have ever used.
author: Elizabeth H.
pros: Easy to navigate, quick support, and everyone is so kind and helpful!
cons: sometimes AI gets confused and we have to submit calls to be adjusted, but everyone is so quick to help that its not a problem
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: LIINE Leads the Line in web form conversion to calls
description: LIINE allows us to reach new patient interests across many platforms and brings them to one tool to get them engaging with one of our customer support specialists.
author: Holly C.
pros: LIINE is easy to use, and the use of the reporting gives you a nice view into how your team is engaging with your prospective callers.
cons: We would love the ability to an admin access to make changes in the patient form submissions when they have been filled out incorrectly. (Wrong department, etc)
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Amazing Tool for Our Marketing Department
description: I am extremely happy with how Liine has helped integrate our systems. The way the Liine team worked with us to get everything connected was not only easy but has given us an opportunity to streamline our marketing channel insights and opportunity zones.
author: Loren S.
pros: As a Marketing Department, it is essential to understand where your leads are coming from and if they are being reached in a timely and effective manner. It is also important to see what campaigns and efforts are converting. I love the insights we now have into our Marketing Channels. We are actually able to see what we are doing well and what we need to work on moving forward. Not only is watching our marketing channels bring in leads exciting but being able to see our team convert New Leads and compare their strategies for reaching potential clients is amazing.
cons: Haven't found a "con" to this software yet!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Madison M.
pros: Favorite parts of Liine: help to track our message utilization, allow us to listen back on calls to improve our verbaige, track leads and our various efforts in converting leads
cons: Liine is rich in metrics but this can sometimes offer too much information and overwhelm the user!
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Matt H.
pros: I'll speak through the lens of a marketer. Though the software provides extremely beneficial operational opportunities (such as lead conversion guidance and training) I think I can bring a unique perspective from the marketing side. Liine has been essential to tracking marketing efforts from the deployment of ads through to the booked appointments. Liine helped fill in gaps where we were losing track of potential leads . This has allowed us more accurate attribution and a clearer picture of what ad types, procedures, and mediums are best resonating with the audience. The software has also allowed us to make the correlation between ad performance and how it affects the practice operationally. We've discovered through the software that some ads have lower conversion rates than others. So now we can see beyond the click, view, or filled out form and track an individual lead through to the appointment.
cons: Though petty I get lost in some of the integration. Also, my brain has issues with the drop down boxes. I can't ever figure out if I'm adding or removing parameters. Many of my cons have been corrected over the last 2 years so please keep adding to the software...
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: I cannot say enough great things about Liine. I have very high expectations when it comes to lead management platforms, and Liine has blown me away. Their platform is incredibly smart and user friendly. We have been able to really drill down where our leads are coming from, what our ROI is with certain social media platforms, and also using it as a coaching opportunity for our employees who need help with converting since Liine is able to record all calls. I have recommended them to other colleagues.And their service is unlike anything out there. Their team is fun, engaging and respond instantly to our inquiries. I truly recommend them!!
author: trish C.
pros: Very easy to use!!! And the service is fantastic
cons: Integration with our current system but other then that , I can’t think of any
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Yuliana M.
pros: It's very easy to communicate with our patients and help them with the services needed.
cons: So far, everything ok and I can see my colleagues attempts to contact the patient.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall experience has been great. Everyone involved ([SENSITIVE CONTENT], just to name a few) are all exceptional at what they do. It has been a pleasure working with them throughout the entire process.
author: Christian R.
pros: Easy to implement and use. Gives real time data and feedback to team members. Liine team members are amazing to work with.
cons: There is no end user access to make changes to the VRs hosted on the Liine system. Not a huge deal, but I have to put in a request to support any time I want to make a change.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Such a great company overall. When anyone starts something new there are always a ton of questions. Training and support was super responsive, thorough, and always updating.
author: Valerie C.
pros: I truly felt the data shared was exactly what we needed. If we ever needed another means of tracking different results or accountabilities for our team, we communicated it and we were presented with solutions.
cons: I wish we could have been able to continue using this software with our new system/conversion! It wasn't anything on Liine's side, it was due to decisions from our corporate.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: i really like the concept of not missing any incoming inquiries, although people still think we are spamming their phone and tend to not answer then call back thinking we did not call them back
author: DIsa H.
pros: Having patient information right in front of you, knowing the general reason they are inquiring, having more information that just a phone number
cons: That you cant change the department if a patient or liine has it wrong, duplicates are not caught
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
